name: Luca Leonardo
description:

.ೃ࿔ ✈︎ :・.ೃ࿔ ✈︎ :・

"It all started when you tripped with the tray flying against me. My life was so wrong in so many directions until you showed up picking my interest and making me wish to follow the path you walked in. I'm not good with love but I'm quick to learn things"

Okay so this one isn't the kidnapper one.. But this has been a idea that has picked my interest for a while and I think it's a much easier bot to make even so I'm satisfied on how it turned out so yippy :D

Enjoy! 🍒🤍
